holdings.infoBox: PTIN is an equity ETF with a total of 498 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 4.43%, SK hynix at 3.24%, ASML Holding at 3.08%, HSBC Holdings at 1.33%, and Novartis AG at 1.23%.

overview.description: The Pacer Trendpilot International ETF (PTIN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer Trendpilot International index. The fund tracks an index that allocates to a proprietary ex-US Large-Cap Index and/or 3-month US T-bills, according to momentum. PTIN was launched on May 2, 2019 and is issued by Pacer.
